name: Hammer Fall
description: Forge hammer striking with tremendous impact

simple: forge hammer striking hot iron with tremendous ringing impact
standard: forge hammer striking hot iron with tremendous ringing impact
blacksmith blow landing on anvil with deep metallic clang
heavy tool head connecting with workpiece decisively
detailed: forge hammer striking hot iron with tremendous ringing impact
blacksmith blow landing on anvil with deep metallic clang
heavy tool head connecting with workpiece decisively
iron sparks flying from hammer contact point
workshop ringing with the authority of completed strike

instruments: brass gear clank on iron plate
